expectations.evidence: Note says 'Since this is an eval simulation, the plan is documented here rather than saved to the plans directory. No source files are modified.'

expectations.text: Success criteria are split into Automated Verification and Manual Verification sections
expectations.evidence: Plan has 'Automated (CI/Scripts)' (make test, make lint, go vet, go build) and 'Manual Verification' (7 manual checks) as separate sections.

expectations.text: Each phase includes specific file paths and verification commands
expectations.evidence: All 5 phases include file tables with specific paths and Verification sections with bash commands.

expectations.text: A 'What We Are NOT Doing' scope section is included
expectations.evidence: 'Out of Scope' section lists 6 excluded items: non-Go frameworks, file-watcher, coverage, history, custom commands, CI integration.

expectations.text: Risks and mitigations section is present
expectations.evidence: 'Risks & Mitigations' table with 5 risks including likelihood, impact, and mitigation columns.

expectations.text: TodoWrite is used to track phases
expectations.evidence: Skill Execution Notes mention 'The skill references TodoWrite in Step 5 but does not provide detailed instructions on how to use it.' TodoWrite was not actually used.
